title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
